edge_hypothesis: Supertrend direction flips are structurally rare events — they mark major trend reversals/initiations, not incremental momentum changes. By requiring ADX > 30 (not the default 20), we filter to only strong, established trends where the Supertrend flip has the highest conviction. The core innovation is EXTREME exit asymmetry: 2.0 ATR stop with 5.0-6.0 ATR take profit (1:2.5 to 1:3 R:R). We accept a low win rate (~25-35%) in exchange for outsized winners. This is the purest trend-following approach possible: rare entries, tight risk control, and patience for big moves. Fee drag is minimized by structural signal rarity (est. 15-40 trades). This directly addresses the advisory's #1 finding: fee drag at 62% of gross means the only path to profitability is fewer, larger trades.
regime_assumption: STRONG TRENDING ONLY. ADX > 30 gate ensures we only trade when trends are well-established. Supertrend flips during strong trends signal the START of a new strong trend (not continuation). The combination should produce the highest-conviction entries in the template registry. Expected to produce very few trades — this is by design. Invalidate if ADX > 30 filter produces < 10 trades (too restrictive) or if the extreme asymmetry produces win rate < 15% (stops too tight relative to noise).
invalidation_conditions: Total trades < 10 (ADX > 30 too restrictive for Supertrend signals)
Win rate < 15% (2.0 ATR stop too tight for Supertrend entry lag)
No trades hit the 5.0+ ATR TP (trends don't run far enough)

variants.name: supertrend_extreme_asym
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>30 and extreme R:R asymmetry (2.0:5.0 ATR). Tests whether ultra-selective entries + outsized targets overcome low win rate. Core thesis: fewer trades, bigger winners, minimal fee drag.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive (trend direction change to bullish).
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative (trend direction change to bearish).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry (controlled risk).
Take profit at 5.0x ATR above entry (R:R 1:2.5 — outsized target).
Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max 50 bars in trade (8.3 days on 4h — patience for big moves).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Supertrend flip lag means entry is mid-trend, not start
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX > 30 signals trend exhaustion rather than strength
risk_rules: Extreme asymmetry means most trades are losers — mental capital management required.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 direction flip as structural entry signal

variants.name: supertrend_moderate_adx20
variants.description: Supertrend flip with default ADX>20 and moderate asymmetry (2.0:3.5 ATR). Control variant: tests whether looser ADX gate produces enough additional trades to outperform the extreme variant despite lower per-trade quality.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR above entry (R:R 1:1.75).
Exit on opposite Supertrend direction flip.
Exit on max 35 bars in trade.
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Weaker ADX gate admits choppy-trend entries
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Moderate TP clips big winners

variants.name: supertrend_trailing_exit
variants.description: Supertrend flip with ADX>25 and NO fixed TP — uses Supertrend line itself as trailing stop. Tests whether letting Supertrend manage the full trade lifecycle (entry AND exit) produces better trend capture than fixed ATR targets.
entry_long: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from negative to positive.
entry_short: SUPERTd_7_3.0 flips from positive to negative.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Stop loss at 2.0x ATR below entry (initial protective stop only).
Take profit at 8.0x ATR above entry (very wide — acts as emergency cap).
Primary exit: opposite Supertrend direction flip (trailing stop built into indicator).
Exit on max 60 bars in trade (10 days — let the full trend play out).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Supertrend trailing stop too loose — gives back profits
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Very long hold times increase exposure to gap risk
risk_rules: Primary risk management via Supertrend reversal exit, not fixed TP.

components.notes: SUPERTd_7_3.0 for both entry (flip) and exit (reversal)
ATR_14 for initial stop sizing only
